title: Pillow Drop
lore: Jay-Zzz claims the kick lands on the exact frame his head hits the pillow — listeners dispute whether that's a compliment or a warning.
artistPersona: Chillhop producer for people who fell asleep on the train and missed their stop. Beats so soft they snore in 4/4.
albumConcept: Jay-Zzz's study-session classic — one beat, zero alarms, four bars then repeat.
